testcase.name: test_single_chip_warmed_perf_reference[blackhole-blackhole-single-chip-reference]

--------------------------------- Captured Log ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_single_and_multichip_warmed_perf[blackhole-p300-1x4-ring]
testcase.system-out:
--------------------------------- Captured Log ---------------------------------
--------------------------------- Captured Out --------------------------------- perf default output: 0.9999998069059012 MULTICHIP_PERF_RESULT variant=default batch=1 seq=18 single_prefill_ms=1.242665 multi_prefill_ms=0.804061 prefill_speedup=1.545485 prefill_efficiency=0.386371 single_decode_ms=0.580907 multi_decode_ms=0.247560 decode_speedup=2.346530 decode_efficiency=0.586633 prefill_repeats=100 trace_replays=1000
